penalties.description: Educational video demonstrating technique, not an actual task performance with measurable timing or completion.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an educational video rather than an actual FLS task performance. The video contains instructional content about knot tying techniques, not a timed suture task with a Penrose drain that can be scored according to FLS rubric. GPT-4o incorrectly interpreted instructional content as actual task performance.

claude_value.description: This is an educational video demonstrating technique, not an actual task performance with measurable timing or completion.

disagreements.rationale: Claude correctly identified that this is educational content, not an actual FLS task performance that can be scored according to the rubric.
No actual task timing is measurable in educational content; GPT-4o incorrectly assigned completion time to instructional material.
Educational demonstrations of techniques cannot be scored as actual task phases according to FLS rubric requirements.
Educational videos cannot receive FLS scores as they are not actual task performances meeting rubric criteria.
